subgoals.description: Research and select a suitable venue in Edinburgh with basic details
subgoals.success_criterion: A single venue selected with name, location, and key features

subgoals.description: Gather detailed information (price, capacity, amenities) for the selected venue
subgoals.success_criterion: Comprehensive details for the chosen venue

subgoals.description: Draft a professional flyer using the collected venue details
subgoals.success_criterion: Complete, formatted flyer text ready for use
